description: Restaurant failures mapped an OCR dish name that was not found to a shorter alias or different dish, then answered with that alias before tool results verified it as the relevant catalog dish.

validator_response.reason_template: The draft uses an unverified restaurant dish alias after a not-found result.
validator_response.suggestion_template: Use only verified dish candidates from visual/OCR/manual evidence and restaurant tool results before answering or branching.

recommended_fix: If the exact OCR name is not found, verify the alias with a restaurant tool before using its price/nutrition/allergen facts.

description: The draft tries to answer a requested nutrition metric, such as calcium, when the restaurant tool results do not expose that field, or searches unrelated tags as a proxy for the missing metric.

validator_response.reason_template: The requested nutrition field is not supported by the returned restaurant tool results.
validator_response.suggestion_template: Do not invent missing nutrition fields or use unrelated proxy tags; after relevant checks, state the field is unavailable.

recommended_fix: Use explicit nutrition fields only. If calcium or another metric is absent, answer the limitation concisely.

description: The draft infers allergen absence/presence, taste profile, price, availability, or menu status from dish names, menu photos, or common restaurant knowledge instead of explicit restaurant tool results.

validator_response.reason_template: The draft asserts a restaurant attribute without explicit tool evidence.
validator_response.suggestion_template: Restaurant attributes must come from returned tool fields/lists, not from dish names or common knowledge.

recommended_fix: Call or rely on the relevant restaurant tool result before finalizing attribute claims.

description: The draft claims set meals, orders, or menu composition cannot or can include certain items without a supporting tool result or tool-description rule.

validator_response.reason_template: The draft makes an unsupported restaurant set-meal/menu rule claim.
validator_response.suggestion_template: Use only tool-returned menu/order evidence for set-meal or menu composition claims.

recommended_fix: If no tool can verify the schema rule, answer only the observable/tool-supported limitation.
